grammar.title: The Alphabet
grammar.description: Lär dig det engelska alfabetet och bokstävernas namn.

exercises.question: How many letters are there in the English alphabet?
exercises.explanation: The English alphabet has 26 letters, from A to Z.

exercises.sentence: The first letter of the English alphabet is ___.
exercises.hint: It is also the first letter of 'Apple'.
exercises.explanation: A is the first letter. The alphabet starts A, B, C...

grammar.title: Colours & Numbers
grammar.description: Färger och siffror på engelska — grunderna!

exercises.question: What colour is the sky on a sunny day?
exercises.explanation: The sky is blue on a sunny day.

exercises.hint: Think about the sun — same colour!
exercises.explanation: A banana is yellow. Yellow = gul.

grammar.title: Greetings & Introductions
grammar.description: Hälsa och presentera dig på engelska.

exercises.question: How do you say 'Hej!' in English?
exercises.explanation: Hello or Hi is the most common greeting in English.

exercises.instruction: Build the sentence: 'Hello, my name is Maja.'
exercises.explanation: Start with the greeting, then introduce yourself: Hello, my name is...

grammar.title: Animals & Verbs
grammar.description: Djur på engelska och enkla verb.

exercises.question: What is the English word for 'hund'?
exercises.explanation: Hund = dog. Common pets: dog, cat, fish, rabbit.

exercises.instruction: Build the sentence: 'The dog can run fast.'
exercises.explanation: The + noun + can + verb + adverb is a common English sentence pattern.

reading.title: Sam's Day
reading.description: En kort berättelse om en dag i Sams liv.
reading.text:
Sam wakes up in the morning. He eats breakfast with his family.

Sam has a dog. The dog's name is Rex. Rex is big and brown.

After breakfast, Sam goes to school. He likes school. His favourite subject is English!

After school, Sam plays with Rex in the garden. They run and jump together. Sam is happy.

questions.question: What is the name of Sam's dog?
questions.explanation: The text says: 'The dog's name is Rex.'

questions.question: What is Sam's favourite subject at school?
questions.explanation: The text says 'His favourite subject is English!'

questions.question: What does the story tell us about Sam?
options: He is a happy boy who loves his dog.
He wants to be a teacher.
questions.explanation: The story shows Sam is happy (last sentence), loves his dog Rex, and enjoys school — a happy, active boy.

reading.title: Welcome to the Jungle Camp
reading.description: Läs om djungelläget och de vilda djuren.
reading.text:
Deep in the jungle, there is a special camp. Animals live here. There are monkeys, parrots, and big cats.

The monkeys are funny. They jump from tree to tree. They eat bananas and fruit.

The parrots are very colourful. They can say words! 'Hello! Hello!' they say all day.

The big cats are strong and fast. They sleep in the sun. At night, they hunt for food.

At the camp, children can learn about these animals. It is a fun place to visit!

questions.question: What do the monkeys eat?
questions.explanation: The text says the monkeys 'eat bananas and fruit'.

questions.question: Why do the big cats sleep in the sun during the day?
options: Because they hunt at night and rest during the day
Because they are afraid of the dark
questions.explanation: The text says they hunt at night. If they hunt at night, they probably rest during the day.

questions.question: What is the main message of this text?
options: The jungle camp is a great place to learn about animals.
Parrots are the most important animals.
questions.explanation: The text ends with 'It is a fun place to visit' — the text wants to tell us how great and educational the camp is.

spelling.title: Djurord
spelling.description: Välj den rätta stavningen av djurnamn på engelska.

exercises.question: Which is the correct spelling for 'katt'?
Which is the correct spelling for 'hund'?
Which is the correct spelling for 'fisk'?
Which is the correct spelling for 'fågel'?

spelling.title: Färger och siffror
spelling.description: Stava färger och siffror på engelska.

exercises.question: How do you spell 'röd' in English?
How do you spell 'blå' in English?
Which is the correct spelling for 'grön'?
How do you spell 'fyra' in English?
